description_long: This is a rectangular, olive-green toolbox with a sturdy, utilitarian design. The surface appears to be made of a hard, slightly textured material, possibly metal or heavy-duty plastic, with a matte finish that shows some wear and subtle scuff marks. The lid fits snugly over the base, and a faint triangular symbol with a biohazard motif is visible on the top, suggesting specialized or hazardous contents. The box has no visible handles or latches on the exterior, giving it a minimalist and secure appearance. The proportions are low and wide, making it suitable for storage on shelves or in vehicle trunks. The overall construction suggests durability and protection for tools or sensitive items inside.
description: A sturdy, olive-green rectangular toolbox with a matte, slightly worn finish and a faint biohazard symbol on the lid. The design is minimalist, with no visible handles or latches.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plain, flat face of the toolbox with the lid's edge and a faint biohazard symbol on top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the box, highlighting the subtle texture and the centered biohazard symbol on the lid.
description_view_2: Opposite end view mirrors the front, with the same plain face and visible lid seam.
description_view_3: Rear view displays the back side, which is featureless and matches the rest of the box's finish.
attribute_handle_type: No visible handle; the box appears to be carried by gripping the sides or bottom.
attribute_latch_mechanism: No visible latch or locking mechanism; the lid appears to be a friction-fit or snap-on type.
attribute_brand_logo: A faint triangular symbol with a biohazard motif is visible on the top center of the lid; no readable text or brand name.
attribute_compartment_configuration: No internal or external compartments, trays, or dividers are visible; the box appears to be a single, undivided container.
attribute_external_labeling: Faint biohazard symbol on the top center of the lid
